# Arka

> Jouw digitale afdeling, zonder de overhead.

Arka is a digital agency based in Dordrecht, Nederland. We help SMBs and freelancers with websites, SEO, AI automation, dashboards, lead generation, and branding -- all as a flexible outsourced digital department.

## Contact

- Website: https://arkadigital.nl
- Email: info@arkadigital.nl
- Phone: +31 6 46140986
- Location: Dordrecht, Nederland
- KVK: 42000761
- BTW: NL005424960B92

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://arkadigital.nl/): Overview of Arka's services, packages, and value proposition.
- [Diensten (Services)](https://arkadigital.nl/diensten): Overview of all six service areas.
- [Websites & Webshops](https://arkadigital.nl/diensten/websites-webshops): Custom design, development and hosting of websites and webshops.
- [SEO & Content](https://arkadigital.nl/diensten/seo-content): Search engine optimization, blog articles and LinkedIn content.
- [AI Chatbots & Automatisering](https://arkadigital.nl/diensten/ai-chatbots-automatisering): Smart chatbots, workflow automation and AI integrations.
- [Dashboards & Data](https://arkadigital.nl/diensten/dashboards-data): KPI dashboards, reporting and data integrations.
- [Lead Generation](https://arkadigital.nl/diensten/lead-generation): Outbound campaigns, funnels and CRM optimization.
- [Branding & Design](https://arkadigital.nl/diensten/branding-design): Visual identity, UI/UX design and brand guidelines.
- [Packages](https://arkadigital.nl/packages): Three pricing tiers (Starter, Professional, Enterprise) with monthly retainer and one-time project options.
- [Cases](https://arkadigital.nl/cases): Portfolio of completed client projects.
- [Blog](https://arkadigital.nl/blog): Articles on digital strategy, SEO, AI, and web development.
- [FAQ](https://arkadigital.nl/faq): Frequently asked questions about services, pricing, and process.
- [Over Ons (About)](https://arkadigital.nl/over-ons): Background on Arka and its approach.
- [Contact](https://arkadigital.nl/contact): Contact form and details.
- [Offerte (Quote)](https://arkadigital.nl/offerte): Request a custom quote.
- [Privacy](https://arkadigital.nl/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Algemene Voorwaarden (Terms)](https://arkadigital.nl/algemene-voorwaarden): General terms and conditions.

## Services

### Websites & Webshops
Custom design, development and hosting of websites and webshops that load fast and convert. Deliverables: responsive design, CMS integration, hosting & maintenance, performance optimization, SSL & security.

### SEO & Content
Search engine optimization, blog articles and LinkedIn content to improve online visibility. Deliverables: technical SEO audit, keyword research, monthly blog articles, LinkedIn posts, content strategy.

### AI Chatbots & Automation
Smart chatbots, workflow automation and AI integrations that speed up processes and serve customers 24/7. Deliverables: custom AI chatbot, process automation, CRM integrations, lead qualification.

### Dashboards & Data
KPI dashboards, reporting and data integrations for business insight. Deliverables: custom dashboard development, data pipeline setup, real-time reporting, API integrations.

### Lead Generation
Outbound campaigns, funnels and CRM optimization for a predictable flow of new leads. Deliverables: lead funnel setup, outbound email campaigns, LinkedIn outreach, CRM setup & optimization.

### Branding & Design
Visual identity, UI/UX design and brand guidelines for a professional and consistent brand. Deliverables: logo & brand identity, brand guidelines, UI/UX design, social media templates.

## Packages

### Starter
For freelancers and small businesses. Includes Websites & Webshops and SEO & Content.
- Monthly retainer: from EUR 1,000/month (min. 3 months)
- One-time project: from EUR 2,500 (delivery in 2-4 weeks)

### Professional
For growing SMBs. Includes Websites & Webshops, SEO & Content, AI Chatbots & Automation, and Branding & Design.
- Monthly retainer: from EUR 2,750/month (min. 6 months)
- One-time project: from EUR 7,000 (delivery in 4-6 weeks)

### Enterprise
For established SMBs and scale-ups. Includes all six services.
- Monthly retainer: from EUR 5,500/month (min. 6 months)
- One-time project: from EUR 18,000 (delivery in 6-10 weeks)

All packages include 30 days of bug fixes after delivery. Hourly rate after that: EUR 95/hour.
